notes: Adds a Game Center Ports library for Super Mario 64 Coop Deluxe, 2 Ship 2 Harkinian, Ship of Harkinian, SpaghettiKart, Starship, and Dusklight.
Builds and bundles the approved open-source port engines without including ROMs or copyrighted game data.
Finds and validates user-owned game files through the existing RetroNAS library, with cached scans and a responsive loading screen.
Forces native NTSC or PAL composite output for game ports on Raspberry Pi while leaving HDMI and desktop resolution behavior unchanged.
